description_long: This is a modern military-style helicopter with a streamlined fuselage, a prominent main rotor with four long blades, and a tail rotor mounted on the vertical stabilizer. The helicopter features a large cockpit with multiple angular windows, providing wide visibility for the crew. Its landing gear consists of robust wheels rather than skids, indicating suitability for both rough and paved surfaces. The exterior is primarily painted in a light gray color, with some visible markings and a side door for crew or passenger access. The tail boom is elongated, supporting the tail rotor and horizontal stabilizers, and the overall build suggests a focus on durability and utility. The helicopter's design and markings suggest it is used by a naval or military organization.
description: A modern, light gray military helicopter with a four-blade main rotor, wheeled landing gear, and a large, angular cockpit. It features a streamlined body, side access door, and visible tail rotor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide cockpit windows, main rotor blades extending outward, and the nose profile.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side door, landing gear, and the full length of the fuselage and tail boom.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail rotor, tail boom, and the back of the main rotor assembly.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the fuselage, landing gear, and tail structure.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, colored dark gray or black, each extending outward with a slight taper and no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Tail rotor is present on the vertical stabilizer, featuring four short blades in a cross configuration, colored dark gray with a protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: This helicopter uses wheeled landing gear instead of skids; the wheels are robust, black, and attached to sturdy struts.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Multiple large, angular cockpit windows wrap around the front and sides, framed in black, with a slight tint and no visible markings.
